vaultResetDescription: This will permanently delete all vault data for {name}. This action cannot be undone.
vaultResetRateLimited: Too many reset requests. Please try again later.
revokeConflict: This reset has already been processed or revoked.
sessionPolicyDescription: Configure session security policies for this tenant.
maxConcurrentSessionsHelp: Maximum number of simultaneous sessions per user. When a user exceeds this limit, the oldest session is automatically terminated. Leave empty for unlimited.
idleTimeoutHelp: Automatically sign out users after this many minutes of inactivity. Maximum 1440 minutes (24 hours). Leave disabled for no idle timeout.
idleTimeoutValidationMax: Must be 1440 minutes (24 hours) or less.
vaultAutoLockHelp: Automatically lock the vault after this many minutes of inactivity, requiring re-entry of the master passphrase. Default is 15 minutes when not configured. Maximum 1440 minutes (24 hours).
vaultAutoLockValidationMax: Must be 1440 minutes (24 hours) or less.
minPinHelp: Require a minimum PIN length when registering security keys. Only applies to authenticators that report PIN length (CTAP2.1 security keys). Does not affect platform authenticators like Touch ID.
accessRestrictionDescription: Restrict access to this tenant by IP address or Tailscale network. When configured, only matching connections are allowed (OR logic).
allowedCidrsHelp: Enter one CIDR per line (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24). Maximum {max} entries. Leave empty to allow all IPs.
tailscaleEnabledHelp: When enabled, only connections from the specified Tailscale tailnet are allowed.
tailscaleTailnetHelp: The tailnet name to allow (e.g. "example" for hostname.example.ts.net).
tailscaleTailnetRequired: Tailnet name is required when Tailscale restriction is enabled.
selfLockoutWarning: Your current IP would be blocked by this policy. Are you sure you want to proceed?
scimManagedRoleError: Cannot change role of SCIM-managed member.
transferOwnershipDesc: Transfer ownership to another member. Your role will be changed to Admin.
